mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYSTEM_LOG ( /* LOG_ID는 IDENTITY 설정에 의해 자동으로 생성되므로 생략 */ LOG_LEVEL, METHOD_NAME, REQUEST_URI, HTTP_METHOD, EXECUTION_TIME, PARAMETER_DATA, ERROR_MSG, ACCESS_IP, LOGIN_ID, LOG_DATE ) VALUES ( #{logLevel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{methodName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{requestUri, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{httpMethod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{executionTime, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{parameterData, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{errorMsg, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{accessIp, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{logDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select:
SELECT LOG_ID, LOG_LEVEL, METHOD_NAME, REQUEST_URI, HTTP_METHOD, EXECUTION_TIME, ACCESS_IP, LOGIN_ID, LOG_DATE FROM SYSTEM_LOG
AND LOG_LEVEL = #{logLevel}
AND LOGIN_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND REQUEST_URI LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND METHOD_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND (LOGIN_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR REQUEST_URI LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY LOG_ID DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
